title: eleocharis plicarhachis
intro: Eleocharis plicarhachis, also known as the folded spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Eleocharis plicarhachis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
